calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-29-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Sue Kaplan; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Sara Lerschen. Petitioner John Yul Hermes represented by Jonathan Daniel Newman, Esq. Petitioner was sworn and examined and court grants the decree changing name to John Hermes. Decree signed in open court.
